stem: Points J and K lie on a circle with center M. The radius of this circle is 14 centimeters. Triangle MJK has a perimeter of 41 centimeters. What is the length, in centimeters, of JK?
rationale: Since M is the center of the circle and J and K lie on the circle, MJ and MK each have length 14. Let the length of JK be x. The perimeter equation 14 + 14 + x = 41 gives x = 13.
